# OpenRouter key allowlist — names here are NEVER deleted by
# audit-openrouter-orphan-keys.yml and do NOT count as actionable orphan/stale
# issues (so the daily scheduled audit stays quiet about them).
#
# One key name per line. '#' comments and blank lines are ignored.
# Use this for keys that are intentional but have no matching edri2or/<name>
# GitHub repo (e.g. a manually-run n8n), which would otherwise be flagged orphan.
#
# The keep_names workflow_dispatch input is merged on top of this list at run time.

n8n-railway-production
n8n-telegram-bot
